skills.name: install-plakar
skills.description: Install the Plakar CLI on Linux, macOS, or Windows and verify the install with a local Kloset.

skills.name: backup-postgres
skills.description: Take a consistent, encrypted, deduplicated backup of a PostgreSQL database into a Plakar Kloset.

skills.name: restore-snapshot
skills.description: Restore files from a Plakar snapshot, or mount the snapshot read-only via FUSE/WinFsp for partial recovery.
